name: Dellan Moor
excerpt: A former soldier living in hiding after deserting his regiment.
notes: Dellan Moor, 29, is a former soldier who served in the 14th Lowland infantry regiment for four years. He deserted fourteen months ago during a reassignment to a punitive posting in the eastern districts. Currently, he lives with Sable Voss in a disused highwayman's waystation on the moorland north of the main coastal road. They have been there for eight months, growing food and making occasional trips to rural markets. Dellan is skilled in carpentry, basic medicine, and animal husbandry, having gained practical skills during his service. He has a regimental tattoo on his left shoulder and is lean with a darker complexion. He trusts Sable completely, though he is uncertain about the permanence of their relationship.
